title: Overground Ores
description: A mod that allows vanilla ores to generate above ground. (As seen in the Hexxit modpack)
body: Overground Ores is a simple mod that adds ore spawning to above ground areas in the overworld. The mod also increases spawn rates of ores in this scenario, in order to provide an experience similar to that of Hexxit. A configuration file is included so you can tweak these values to your heart's desire, and don't have to rely on my pre-determined values, that suit my purposes.
